## Summary

- What does this PR change?
- Why is this change needed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Build/packaging

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `python -m compileall .`
- [ ] I tested the change locally
- [ ] I ran Rust checks for native code (if touched)

## Screenshots / Video

Add screenshots or short recordings for visible UI changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] I updated docs when needed
- [ ] I kept changes scoped and focused
- [ ] I added or updated tests when possible
- [ ] I linked related issues

## Related Issues

Closes #
